title: Bisikan Dosa
overview: Sarimah moved to Kuala Lumpur to start a new life following the tragic death of her small child and her ex-husband had cheated. She became a housekeep for Ayden's family but not so long later, She was haunted by a disturbed spirit that she identified from the family portrait as Zara, Ayden's wife.
